item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Today France made History
item.description: On May 28, 2026, the French National Assembly unanimously voted to repeal the remaining legal traces of the “Code Noir” (“Black Code”), the infamous slavery code established under King Louis XIV in 1685. The vote result was striking: 254 members voted, the required majority was 128, 254 voted in favor, 0 voted against. The “Code Noir” (“Black Code”) had regulated slavery in the French colonies. It defined enslaved Africans as property, imposed Catholicism upon them, and authorized severe punishments. Although slavery itself had long been abolished, the text had never been formally removed from French law. France first abolished slavery during the French Revolution in 1794. However, Napoleon Bonaparte restored it in 1802 in several French colonies. Slavery was then definitively abolished in 1848 under the Second Republic, notably through the action of abolitionist Victor SCHŒLCHER. The 2026 repeal is therefore mostly symbolic, but many French lawmakers described it as an important act of historical recognition, memory, and justice. I didn't find it translated but the emotion of parliament member Steevy Gustave speak to the heart of every human : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tHN2shM_LPw
item.dc:creator: torp

item.title: America sure is winning, huh?
item.description: Fp Edit: Well, I don't have the money to, but I can't avoid it, having to get an oil change. And last time I priced it, it's gone up nearly $15-$20 just in a month from the same place I was going to go to. I'm tired of struggling. Every day. I'm tired of the anxiety all this is causing. And I'm tired of them getting away with it.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Dino-Riders memes
item.description:
The alien, human-like Valorians are hunted by the vile Rulons to prehistoric Earth, where they all become Dino-Riders in order to sell toys. Cool hecking toys
2. The animal models were sold separately at the Smithsonian Institution
3
4
5. Obviously the franchise mixes animals of different kinds and time periods freely
6
7. Warlord Krulos and his Rulons, by InDeepBlue
8 by edsfox
9 by Krulos
10 by T-RexJones
11. In an episode some Valorians time traveled to the Ice Age; it spawned the third and last line of toys
12. Questar, the leader of the Valorians
13. A Transformers crossover by Matt Moylan
14
Wait for it. Or don't. I'm not your dino commander

item.title: 2026 drop of millions of international visitors creates an economic shortfall up to $12.5 Billion.
item.description: The industry used to support 20 million workers accounting for almost 7% of all government income. Some countries range up to 24%, 28% and 33% drop in visiting the US. https://wttc.org/news/us-economy-set-to-lose-12-5bn-in-international-traveler-spend-this-year

item.title: One of the greatest physicists of all time spoke like a working man from Queens.
item.description: Richard Feynman, Nobel winning physicist on the same level as Einstein and Schrödinger, describing how fire works in the plainest English I can imagine, Full video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P1ww1IXRfTA

item.title: GovBrief Today #483
item.description: Michael Dell gave $6.25 billion to Donald Trump's signature children's accounts, and now the Pentagon has handed Dell a $9.7 billion contract. Trump personally told the country to go out and buy Dell, so the contract looks less like a competition than an order being filled. It is not the only one. ProPublica reported today that the White House steered a $620 million Pentagon loan to a startup partly owned by the president's son, Donald Trump Jr. The Pentagon insists both deals were won on the merits and that no company gets special treatment. But one of its own officials says the White House made the call, and a second loan for one of Don Jr.'s companies is already in the queue. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell your representatives to investigate both. I've emailed 7,597 stories over 483 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260528-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may28 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-mail-vote [3] https://go.govbrief.today/la-house [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-app [5] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-199 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-hoffman [7] https://go.govbrief.today/undercover-plates [8] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-wsj-2 [9] https://go.govbrief.today/barrett-swatting [10] https://go.govbrief.today/delaney-arrests [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-currency [12] https://go.govbrief.today/freedom-concert [13] https://go.govbrief.today/dell-pentagon [14] https://go.govbrief.today/gold-horses [15] https://go.govbrief.today/vulcan-deal [16] https://go.govbrief.today/people-festival Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Dump of the dinojor variety (recycled)
item.description:
Some memes I collect to send to a friend who loves dinosaurs. (Although, who doesn't?) He's probably not seen all of these, because I keep forgetting which ones I've sent and which ones I haven't. Then again, it's a friend who's on Imgur, so he *should've* seen all of these? So .... ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
“Victorian Velociraptor with Violets.” Acrylic and liquid gold leaf on Rives BFK. Made by Adam Mazur. https://www.tumblr.com/adamazur/629013033127231488/adamazur-victorian-velociraptor-with-violets
https://xkcd.com/3012/ (image text: Dinosaur Cosmics)
Chuck Eiler is a digital artist who takes photos of posed figurines and then digitally adds more lighting, textures and detail to each one. He shows the process for this specific image at his Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/p/C118oSauj_I/?img_index=1 (sometimes outside links get stripped when you click "post to gallery", so I'm really hoping these stay this time)
*her (as @pocsaclypse pointed out)
Almost weekend. Hope yours is good and be kind to others. #memes #dinosaurs #funny #wholesome
item.dc:creator: DutchBoeremeisie
